generated_oml:
@prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab# .
@prefix base: http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema# .

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i Depth Camera for depth perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle internal sensor for real-time speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle internal sensor for steering angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth perception data from Intel D435i camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Combined vehicle state data including speed and steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted, SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks generated from Kalman filter processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm for LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for real-time communication and node management"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing and complex system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration and system management"
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and node development"
]

instance CppNodeLifecycleManager : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for ROS2 node lifecycle management"
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing vehicle state data and object tracks as time-series"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data monitoring with visualization and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualization, ReportGeneration
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC logic execution on Digital Twin for computation offloading"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCCommand
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management via UI for ACC control and emergency actions"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, DisableACC, AdjustDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBraking
]

instance RealTimeVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of object tracks, vehicle state, and projected driving path"
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable reports for operator monitoring and decision-making support"
]

instance ACCCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated ACC command for desired speed adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC functionality via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC functionality via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AdjustDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust desired speed for ACC via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBraking : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor actuation"
]

instance SteeringServoController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo control for steering angle adjustments"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical twin environment containing vehicle hardware components"
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServoController
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital twin environment for processing and simulation"
    base:contains ROS2Middleware, MATLABSimulink, DBSCANClusteringModel, KalmanFilterModel, ACCControlModel, SQLDatabaseEnabler, DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance UserEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User interface environment for remote management"
    base:contains RemoteManagementService
]

instance CrossSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Cross-system integration environment for ROS2 packages"
    base:contains ROS2Middleware
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control signals (desired speed, emergency braking commands) from the Digital Twin Entity's Controlling FE to vehicle actuators, including motor voltage commands and steering servo adjustments."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with ≤100 ms end-to-end latency (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy across all components for event ordering and coordination."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based orchestration with Physical Twin Entity (vehicle-mounted Jetson Orin Nano), Digital Twin Entity (cloud-hosted), User Entity (separate client machines), and Cross-System Data Translation FE; intra-entity communication via ROS2, inter-entity via Wi-Fi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase (ADAS development, validation of requirements) and operational phase (real-time monitoring, optimization, and health monitoring during vehicle operation)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-entity communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication, adhering to ≤100 ms latency and 100 ms clock synchronization requirements."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle-mounted Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity and Data Storage in cloud environment; User Entity components on separate client machines."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT structure, ISO 15622 for ACC control functionality, and 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements."
]
